name: Customer Reconciliation System - SAP Finance Standard

assignments.name: validationMessage
assignments.value: ={{ $json.customerId === "UNKNOWN" ? "Customer ID not found in master data" : ($json.invoiceId === "" ? "Invoice ID missing" : (!$json.customerName ? "Customer name missing" : "Validation passed")) }}

assignments.name: emailSubject
assignments.value: ={{ "🔴 Marico AR Reconciliation - " + $now.toFormat("dd MMM yyyy") + " - Status: " + $json.summary.reconciliationStatus + " - " + ($json.summary.totalFinancialDisputes + $json.summary.totalOperationalIssues + $json.summary.totalDataQualityIssues) + " Disputes" }}

assignments.name: emailBody
assignments.value:
={{ "MARICO INTELLIGENT RECONCILIATION SYSTEM
ML-Powered Dispute Prediction | SAP AR/SD/FI Aligned | OT/MT/D2C Channels

Report Generated: " + $now.toFormat("dd MMMM yyyy HH:mm") + " IST
" + "=".repeat(80) + "

📊 EXECUTIVE SUMMARY (SAP FI-AR)
" + "-".repeat(80) + "
" + "Total Invoices Processed: " + $json.summary.totalInvoicesProcessed + "
" + "Total Invoice Amount (Gross): ₹" + $json.summary.totalInvoiceAmount.toLocaleString() + "
" + "Total Payment Received: ₹" + $json.summary.totalPaymentReceived.toLocaleString() + "
" + "Total Claims Raised: ₹" + $json.summary.totalClaims.toLocaleString() + "
" + "Total Returns: ₹" + $json.summary.totalReturns.toLocaleString() + "
" + "Total Net Payable: ₹" + $json.summary.totalNetPayable.toLocaleString() + "
" + "Net Receivable Exposure: ₹" + $json.summary.netReceivableExposure.toLocaleString() + " " + ($json.summary.netReceivableExposure > 0 ? "(Outstanding AR)" : "(Credit Balance)") + "
" + "Total Credit Memo Value: ₹" + $json.summary.totalCreditMemoValue.toLocaleString() + "
" + "Total Outstanding AR: ₹" + $json.summary.totalOutstandingAR.toLocaleString() + "
" + "Total Debit Adjustment: ₹" + $json.summary.totalDebitAdjustment.toLocaleString() + "

🤖 ML INSIGHTS
" + "-".repeat(80) + "
" + "High Risk Invoices (Score >70): " + $json.invoices.filter(i => i.riskScore > 70).length + "
" + "Medium Risk Invoices (Score 50-70): " + $json.invoices.filter(i => i.riskScore >= 50 && i.riskScore <= 70).length + "
" + "High Dispute Probability (>70%): " + $json.invoices.filter(i => i.mlDisputeProbability > 0.7).length + "
" + "Patterns Detected: " + $json.invoices.filter(i => i.detectedPatterns && i.detectedPatterns.length > 0).length + " invoices

📈 RECONCILIATION BREAKDOWN
" + "-".repeat(80) + "
" + "✅ Matched Invoices: " + $json.summary.matchedInvoices + "
" + "⚠️ Overpayments (Credit Memo): " + $json.summary.overpaymentCount + " invoices | ₹" + $json.summary.totalCreditMemoValue.toLocaleString() + "
" + "⚠️ Underpayments (Debit Adjustment): " + $json.summary.underpaymentCount + " invoices | ₹" + $json.summary.totalDebitAdjustment.toLocaleString() + "
" + "🔴 Missing Payments (Outstanding AR): " + $json.summary.missingPaymentCount + " invoices | ₹" + ($json.summary.totalOutstandingAR - $json.summary.totalDebitAdjustment).toLocaleString() + "
" + "💡 Claim Disputes: " + $json.summary.claimDisputesCount + " invoices
" + "🚚 Logistics Issues: " + $json.summary.logisticsDamageCount + " invoices
" + "❌ Data Quality Issues: " + $json.summary.dataQualityIssuesCount + " invoices

✅ FINANCIAL INTEGRITY CHECK (SAP FI)
" + "-".repeat(80) + "
" + "Reconciliation Status: " + $json.summary.reconciliationStatus + "
" + "Reason: " + $json.summary.balanceReason + "
" + "Audit Timestamp: " + $json.summary.auditTimestamp + "
" + "Financial Integrity: " + $json.summary.financialIntegrityCheck + "

🔴 SECTION 1: FINANCIAL DISPUTES (" + $json.financialDisputes.length + " items)
" + "-".repeat(80) + "
" + ($json.financialDisputes.length > 0 ? $json.financialDisputes.slice(0, 5).map(inv => "Invoice: " + inv.invoiceId + " | Customer: " + inv.customerName + " (" + inv.customerId + ")
" + "Channel: " + inv.channel + " | Issue Type: " + inv.issueType + " | Risk Priority: " + inv.riskPriority + "
" + "Invoice Amount: ₹" + inv.invoiceAmount.toLocaleString() + " | Net Payable: ₹" + inv.netPayable.toLocaleString() + " | Payment: ₹" + inv.paymentAmount.toLocaleString() + "
" + "Difference: ₹" + Math.abs(inv.paymentDifference).toLocaleString() + " " + (inv.paymentDifference > 0 ? "(Outstanding AR)" : "(Credit Memo)") + "
" + "ML Risk Score: " + inv.riskScore + "/100 | Dispute Probability: " + (inv.mlDisputeProbability * 100).toFixed(0) + "% (" + inv.mlDisputeCategory + ")
" + "AI Analysis: " + inv.aiExplanation + "
" + "SAP Resolution Steps: " + inv.suggestedAction + "
" + (inv.detectedPatterns && inv.detectedPatterns.length > 0 ? "Patterns: " + inv.detectedPatterns.join("; ") : "")).join("
" + "-".repeat(80) + "
") + ($json.financialDisputes.length > 5 ? "
... and " + ($json.financialDisputes.length - 5) + " more disputes (see Google Sheets for full details)" : "") : "None - All financial transactions reconciled") + "

🚚 SECTION 2: OPERATIONAL ISSUES (" + $json.operationalIssues.length + " items)
" + "-".repeat(80) + "
" + ($json.operationalIssues.length > 0 ? $json.operationalIssues.map(inv => "Invoice: " + inv.invoiceId + " | Customer: " + inv.customerName + "
" + "Issue: " + inv.issueType + " | POD Status: " + inv.podStatus + " | Risk Score: " + inv.riskScore + "/100
" + "Financial Impact: " + (Math.abs(inv.paymentDifference) > 0 ? "₹" + Math.abs(inv.paymentDifference).toLocaleString() : "Pending Valuation") + "
" + "Root Cause: " + inv.aiExplanation + "
" + "SAP Action Required: " + inv.suggestedAction).join("
" + "-".repeat(80) + "
") : "None - All deliveries confirmed") + "

❌ SECTION 3: DATA QUALITY ISSUES (" + $json.dataQualityIssues.length + " items)
" + "-".repeat(80) + "
" + ($json.dataQualityIssues.length > 0 ? $json.dataQualityIssues.map(inv => "Invoice: " + inv.invoiceId + " | Customer ID: " + inv.customerId + "
" + "Issue: " + inv.validationMessage + " | Risk Score: " + inv.riskScore + "/100
" + "Financial Value: " + (inv.invoiceAmount > 0 ? "₹" + inv.invoiceAmount.toLocaleString() + " (Pending Valuation - Cannot Process)" : "Pending Valuation") + "
" + "SAP Master Data Action: " + inv.suggestedAction).join("
" + "-".repeat(80) + "
") : "None - All master data validated") + "

" + "=".repeat(80) + "
" + "Full invoice-level details with ML predictions exported to Google Sheets
" + "SAP Modules: AR (F-32), SD (VF04), FI (FB75)
" + "ML Features: Dispute probability, risk scoring, pattern detection
" + "Compliance Standard: CFO Audit-Ready | 100% Mathematical Accuracy
" + "Financial Integrity: VERIFIED | Auto-Correction: ENABLED
" + "System: n8n Enterprise Automation + ML Engine + SAP Finance Logic" }}

parameters.content:
🚀 MARICO INTELLIGENT RECONCILIATION SYSTEM

Event-Driven Architecture: Webhook (real-time) + Schedule (daily batch)
ML-Powered: Dispute prediction, risk scoring, pattern detection
SAP Integration: AR/SD/FI modules aligned
Channels: OT/MT/D2C
Output: Audit-ready CFO reports + automated alerts
VALIDATION LAYER - Mandatory checks: Customer exists in master data, Invoice exists in ERP, Flag data quality issues - SAP-aligned validation rules
RECONCILIATION ENGINE - SAP-aligned calculations: Net Payable = Invoice - (Claims + Returns + Discounts), Payment Difference = Net Payable - Payment, Absolute Difference for risk assessment

🤖 ML DISPUTE PREDICTION & RISK SCORING

Machine Learning Features:
• Dispute probability (0-1 scale)
• Risk score (0-100)
• Pattern detection (repeat offenders, anomalies)
• Multi-dimensional risk factors

Hybrid Approach:
• Rule-based SAP logic + ML predictions
• No external API calls (instant processing)
• AI explains, never modifies financial values

Outputs: Dispute probability, risk priority, SAP-aligned actions

📊 CFO-GRADE FINANCIAL SUMMARY + INTELLIGENT ALERTS

QUALITY CONTROL RULES:
✅ 100% Mathematical Accuracy (Auto-Recalculation)
✅ SAP-Standard Terminology (Credit Memo, Outstanding AR, Debit Adjustment)
✅ No ₹0 for Issues (Pending Valuation)
✅ Strict Category Separation (Financial | Operational | Data Quality)
✅ ML Risk Scoring (0-100) + Dispute Probability (0-1)
✅ Pattern Detection (Repeat offenders, anomalies)
✅ Conditional Email Alerts (Only high-priority disputes)
✅ Audit-Ready with Full Traceability
